import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut total = 0
  for part in parts
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if n > 0
      total = total + n * 2
    end
  end
  print("result=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
